title: Spoons, Funnydin 36 Pieces Stainless Steel Spoons Set, 6.8 Inch, Spoons Cutlery Only, Dishwasher Safe, Dinner Spoon, Dessert Spoons for Home Kitchen & Restaurant
features: 【Good Value】This spoons set has 36 pieces, which is more quantity than 12 regular spoons on the market, and the price is more affordable. This spoons set is a great choice for restaurants if you want to reduce operating costs.

【Durable High Quality Spoon】This dinner spoons set is made of high quality stainless steel without any harmful substances, no fading or chipping, ensures rust resistance and sturdy enough for basic daily use for many years. This spoon set looks as good as new over time.

【Simple & Classic Looking】No complicated handle decoration, elegant and simple design favored by most people. The classic design spoons cutlery would match well with your existing cutlery and elevate your everyday meals into a fine dining experience.

【Ergonomic Design】The handle of stainless steel spoon has a soft arc, which perfectly matches the grip position of your hand, allowing you to grasp the spoon very easily, conveniently and effortlessly.

【Funnydin’s Promise】Funnydin's business philosophy is to provide customers with a satisfactory shopping experience with high-quality spoons cutlery and nice-value. If you have any dissatisfaction, please feel free to contact us. We are looking forward to your feedback and make improvements immediately.

Features： -Set of 36 -Size: 6.8 Inch -Material: 18/0 Stainless Steel -Elegant And Classics Design -Mirror Polished Finish -Ergonomic Handle -Dishwasher Safe The classic multi-piece design makes this spoons set more cost-effective. The 36 pieces spoons can meet almost all multi-person use scenarios. Thanks to the classic design, it will be a nice replenish when one of your cutlery unfortunately loses the spoon. Simple & Clean Look No complicated handle decoration, elegant and simple design favored by most people. And it match any style of your cutlery. Mirror Polish The spoons set is mirror polished to make sure no rough spot to hurt your mouth. Not need re-polishing and stay shining, easy to care and dishwasher safe. Healthy & Durability Our spoon set is heavy duty not flimsy, high hardness, no distortion, durable construction make sure that it can be used for years. For more cutlery set, please go to Funnydin Store. Funnydin has always been committed to providing more cost-effective cutlery, and we will focus more on developing better cutlery set that is more suitable for life. Thank you for choosing Funnydin. Warm Tips: 1、Please wash the cutlery before first use to make sure no manufacturing residue. 2、Please clean the flatware set after using and dry the pieces for their durability. 3、Please do not use iron wire to scratch the pieces to keep their smooth surface. 4、The cutlery set is Dishwasher Safe so you can clean it in dishwasher to save your time. 5、For safety, please let your young kid use this silverware set when accompanied by an adult.
